"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import {
  ChevronDownIcon,
  ChevronLeftIcon,
  ChevronRightIcon,
} from "lucide-react"
import { DayButton, DayPicker, getDefaultClassNames } from "react-day-picker"
import { Button, buttonVariants } from "@/registry/new-york/ui/button"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

function Calendar({
  className,
  classNames,
  showOutsideDays = true,
  captionLayout = "label",
  buttonVariant = "ghost",
  formatters,
  components,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DayPicker> & {
  buttonVariant?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>["variant"]
}) {
  const defaultClassNames = getDefaultClassNames()

  return (
    <DayPicker
      showOutsideDays={showOutsideDays}
      className={tw.def([String.raw`rtl:**:[.rdp-button\_next>svg]:rotate-180`, String.raw`rtl:**:[.rdp-button\_previous>svg]:rotate-180`, className], {
          backgroundColor: "bg-background",
          padding: "p-3",
          "[[data-slot=card-content]_&]": {
              backgroundColor: "[[data-slot=card-content]_&]:bg-transparent",
          },
          "[[data-slot=popover-content]_&]": {
              backgroundColor: "[[data-slot=popover-content]_&]:bg-transparent",
          },
      })}
      captionLayout={captionLayout}
      formatters={{
        formatMonthDropdown: (date) =>
          date.toLocaleString("default", { month: "short" }),
        ...formatters,
      }}
      classNames={{
        root: tw.def([defaultClassNames.root], {
              width: "w-fit",
          }),
        months: tw.def([defaultClassNames.months], {
            position: "relative",
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "flex-col",
            gap: "gap-4",
            md: {
                flexDirection: "md:flex-row",
            },
        }),
        month: tw.def([defaultClassNames.month], {
            display: "flex",
            width: "w-full",
            flexDirection: "flex-col",
            gap: "gap-4",
        }),
        nav: tw.def([defaultClassNames.nav], {
            position: "absolute",
            inset: "inset-x-0",
            top: "top-0",
            display: "flex",
            width: "w-full",
            alignItems: "items-center",
            justifyContent: "justify-between",
            gap: "gap-1",
        }),
        button_previous: tw.def([buttonVariants({ variant: buttonVariant }), defaultClassNames.button_previous], {
            height: "h-[--cell-size]",
            width: "w-[--cell-size]",
            userSelect: "select-none",
            padding: "p-0",
            "aria-disabled": {
                opacity: "aria-disabled:opacity-50",
            },
        }),
        button_next: tw.def([buttonVariants({ variant: buttonVariant }), defaultClassNames.button_next], {
            height: "h-[--cell-size]",
            width: "w-[--cell-size]",
            userSelect: "select-none",
            padding: "p-0",
            "aria-disabled": {
                opacity: "aria-disabled:opacity-50",
            },
        }),
        month_caption: tw.def([defaultClassNames.month_caption], {
            display: "flex",
            height: "h-[--cell-size]",
            width: "w-full",
            alignItems: "items-center",
            justifyContent: "justify-center",
            padding: "px-[--cell-size]",
        }),
        dropdowns: tw.def([defaultClassNames.dropdowns], {
            display: "flex",
            height: "h-[--cell-size]",
            width: "w-full",
            alignItems: "items-center",
            justifyContent: "justify-center",
            gap: "gap-1.5",
            fontSize: "text-sm",
            fontWeight: "font-medium",
        }),
        dropdown_root: tw.def([defaultClassNames.dropdown_root], {
            "has-focus": {
                borderWidth: "has-focus:border-ring",
                boxShadow: ["has-focus:ring-ring/50", "has-focus:ring-[3px]"],
            },
            borderWidth: ["border-input", "border"],
            boxShadow: "shadow-xs",
            position: "relative",
            borderRadius: "rounded-md",
        }),
        dropdown: tw.def([defaultClassNames.dropdown], {
            backgroundColor: "bg-popover",
            position: "absolute",
            inset: "inset-0",
            opacity: "opacity-0",
        }),
        caption_label: tw.def([captionLayout === "label"
                    ? "text-sm"
                    : "[&>svg]:text-muted-foreground flex h-8 items-center gap-1 rounded-md pl-2 pr-1 text-sm [&>svg]:size-3.5", defaultClassNames.caption_label], {
            userSelect: "select-none",
            fontWeight: "font-medium",
        }),
        table: "w-full border-collapse",
        weekdays: tw.def([defaultClassNames.weekdays], {
            display: "flex",
        }),
        weekday: tw.def([defaultClassNames.weekday], {
            color: "text-muted-foreground",
            userSelect: "select-none",
            borderRadius: "rounded-md",
            fontSize: "text-[0.8rem]",
            fontWeight: "font-normal",
        }),
        week: tw.def([defaultClassNames.week], {
            margin: "mt-2",
            display: "flex",
            width: "w-full",
        }),
        week_number_header: tw.def([defaultClassNames.week_number_header], {
            width: "w-[--cell-size]",
            userSelect: "select-none",
        }),
        week_number: tw.def([defaultClassNames.week_number], {
            color: "text-muted-foreground",
            userSelect: "select-none",
            fontSize: "text-[0.8rem]",
        }),
        day: tw.def([defaultClassNames.day], {
            position: "relative",
            aspectRatio: "aspect-square",
            height: "h-full",
            width: "w-full",
            userSelect: "select-none",
            padding: "p-0",
            textAlign: "text-center",
            "[&:first-child[data-selected=true]_button]": {
                borderRadius: "[&:first-child[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-l-md",
            },
            "[&:last-child[data-selected=true]_button]": {
                borderRadius: "[&:last-child[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-r-md",
            },
        }),
        range_start: tw.def([defaultClassNames.range_start], {
            backgroundColor: "bg-accent",
            borderRadius: "rounded-l-md",
        }),
        range_middle: tw.def([defaultClassNames.range_middle], {
            borderRadius: "rounded-none",
        }),
        range_end: tw.def([defaultClassNames.range_end], {
            backgroundColor: "bg-accent",
            borderRadius: "rounded-r-md",
        }),
        today: tw.def([defaultClassNames.today], {
            backgroundColor: "bg-accent",
            color: "text-accent-foreground",
            borderRadius: "rounded-md",
            "data-[selected=true]": {
                borderRadius: "data-[selected=true]:rounded-none",
            },
        }),
        outside: tw.def([defaultClassNames.outside], {
            color: "text-muted-foreground",
            "aria-selected": {
                color: "aria-selected:text-muted-foreground",
            },
        }),
        disabled: tw.def([defaultClassNames.disabled], {
            color: "text-muted-foreground",
            opacity: "opacity-50",
        }),
        hidden: tw.def([defaultClassNames.hidden], {
            visibility: "invisible",
        }),
        ...classNames,
      }}
      components={{
        Root: ({ className, rootRef, ...props }) => {
          return (
            <div
              data-slot="calendar"
              ref={rootRef}
              className={tw.join(className)}
              {...props}
            />
          )
        },
        Chevron: ({ className, orientation, ...props }) => {
          if (orientation === "left") {
            return (
              <ChevronLeftIcon className={tw.def([className], {
                    width: "size-4",
                })} {...props} />
            )
          }

          if (orientation === "right") {
            return (
              <ChevronRightIcon
                className={tw.def([className], {
                        width: "size-4",
                    })}
                {...props}
              />
            )
          }

          return (
            <ChevronDownIcon className={tw.def([className], {
                  width: "size-4",
              })} {...props} />
          )
        },
        DayButton: CalendarDayButton,
        WeekNumber: ({ children, ...props }) => {
          return (
            <td {...props}>
              <div className={tw.style({
                      display: "flex",
                      width: "size-[--cell-size]",
                      alignItems: "items-center",
                      justifyContent: "justify-center",
                      textAlign: "text-center",
                  }).class()}>
                {children}
              </div>
            </td>
          )
        },
        ...components,
      }}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function CalendarDayButton({
  className,
  day,
  modifiers,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DayButton>) {
  const defaultClassNames = getDefaultClassNames()

  const ref = React.useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null)
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (modifiers.focused) ref.current?.focus()
  }, [modifiers.focused])

  return (
    <Button
      ref={ref}
      variant="ghost"
      size="icon"
      data-day={day.date.toLocaleDateString()}
      data-selected-single={
        modifiers.selected &&
        !modifiers.range_start &&
        !modifiers.range_end &&
        !modifiers.range_middle
      }
      data-range-start={modifiers.range_start}
      data-range-end={modifiers.range_end}
      data-range-middle={modifiers.range_middle}
      className={tw.def([defaultClassNames.day, className], {
          "data-[selected-single=true]": {
              backgroundColor: "data-[selected-single=true]:bg-primary",
              color: "data-[selected-single=true]:text-primary-foreground",
          },
          "data-[range-middle=true]": {
              backgroundColor: "data-[range-middle=true]:bg-accent",
              color: "data-[range-middle=true]:text-accent-foreground",
              borderRadius: "data-[range-middle=true]:rounded-none",
          },
          "data-[range-start=true]": {
              backgroundColor: "data-[range-start=true]:bg-primary",
              color: "data-[range-start=true]:text-primary-foreground",
              borderRadius: "data-[range-start=true]:rounded-md",
          },
          "data-[range-end=true]": {
              backgroundColor: "data-[range-end=true]:bg-primary",
              color: "data-[range-end=true]:text-primary-foreground",
              borderRadius: "data-[range-end=true]:rounded-md",
          },
          "group-data-[focused=true]/day": {
              borderWidth: "group-data-[focused=true]/day:border-ring",
              boxShadow: ["group-data-[focused=true]/day:ring-ring/50", "group-data-[focused=true]/day:ring-[3px]"],
              position: "group-data-[focused=true]/day:relative",
              zIndex: "group-data-[focused=true]/day:z-10",
          },
          display: "flex",
          aspectRatio: "aspect-square",
          height: "h-auto",
          width: "w-full",
          minWidth: "min-w-[--cell-size]",
          flexDirection: "flex-col",
          gap: "gap-1",
          fontWeight: "font-normal",
          lineHeight: "leading-none",
          "[&>span]": {
              fontSize: "[&>span]:text-xs",
              opacity: "[&>span]:opacity-70",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Calendar, CalendarDayButton }
